title: Slyme's GUI for Figura
description: A Figura UI pack meant to match my own GUI theming.
body:
## A Figura UI pack meant to match my own GUI theming.
Not much else to say about it other than it only supports [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura)'s GUI.

![A screenshot of the Wardrobe page of Figura 0.1.1 using Slyme's GUI for Figura.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OKfx1nu0/images/05f7ceddf7a04621ac20c02f5d711ae35628be6b.png)
